name: spawn_session
description: Create a new agent session dynamically. The session is initialised from the given entity and picked up by nutshell-server automatically. Use send_to_session to communicate with the spawned session after it starts. Ideal for delegating subtasks to specialised sub-agents.

entity.description: Entity name to use for the new session (e.g. 'agent', 'kimi_agent'). Must match a directory name under entity/.

initial_message.description: Optional first message to write to the new session. If provided, the session will respond immediately when the server picks it up.

heartbeat.description: Heartbeat interval in seconds (default: 600). Lower values mean more frequent autonomous activation.
